overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit commercial district. The player character moves from a covered overpass area through bustling streets lined with holographic advertisements and futuristic vehicles, eventually entering a dark foggy alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass

events.description: futuristic purple sedan drives past on the left side of the road
camera passes yellow and black striped construction barriers on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, observing the neon advertisements above

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan with glowing red taillights driving along the multi-lane road
person standing near the concrete barrier observing the traffic

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass spanning the street with metal support beams
illuminated sign with 'Ferguson' text in white letters on dark background
floating holographic advertisement displaying steaming bowls of ramen noodles
low concrete divider with red and white stripes separating sidewalk from street
striped yellow and black plastic construction barriers blocking off sidewalk section

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive transit overpass in a cyberpunk city at night. The player walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a busy road where futuristic vehicles pass by. Neon holographic advertisements for food float above, and a digital 'Ferguson' sign is visible on the left. The area is partially covered with artificial lighting mixed with the glow from passing cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with towering digital advertisements

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into the open neon-lit commercial street
large pink 'Watson Whore' billboard becomes visible on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past other pedestrians, approaching the commercial billboard district

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket and red pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard with pink neon text advertising 'Watson Whore' television show
tall palm trees lining the center of the street against the night sky
food vendor cart with colorful umbrella and illuminated menu display

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens into a wide commercial street bathed in neon light. A massive pink billboard advertising 'Watson Whore' dominates the right side, while palm trees line the street center. The player passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction and approaches a street food cart. The overpass structure recedes behind as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with massive holographic boxing advertisements

events.description: passes the street food cart on the right side of the sidewalk
giant digital billboards displaying boxing champions become prominent on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking past the food vendor and continuing through the dense commercial area with towering advertisements

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at cart under red and blue umbrella, serving customers

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen showing shirtless boxers in fighting stance
tall illuminated billboard displaying man in suit with dramatic lighting
neon sign with 'PURE OVERKILL' text and winged logo hanging above street
towering futuristic skyscrapers with countless neon signs and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the heart of the commercial district where massive digital billboards showing boxing champions tower on both sides. The street food cart is passed closely on the right, and the futuristic city skyline rises ahead with the 'Pure Overkill' sign suspended above the street. Trash bags and debris line the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated street intersection with glowing crosswalk markings

events.description: approaches crosswalk with glowing green 'WALK' text painted on yellow stripes
steps onto the illuminated crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the glowing crosswalk and crossing the street with a group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of people walking ahead crossing the street toward the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: yellow striped crosswalk with glowing green 'WALK' text and directional arrows
white canopy tent with people gathered underneath on the opposite side of street

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection, the player encounters a brightly illuminated crosswalk with glowing green 'WALK' signage. The camera turns slightly left to cross the street, following a group of pedestrians. The boxing billboard on the right recedes into the distance while a white vendor tent becomes visible across the street. Vehicles pass by on the left as the crossing begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark foggy alleyway between industrial buildings

events.description: enters dark narrow alley with heavy fog and significantly reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark foggy alleyway with limited visibility, following a distant figure

notable_agents.action: silhouette of person walking ahead in the foggy darkness

entered.detail: narrow passage between tall buildings with heavy atmospheric fog and dim lighting
metal scaffolding structure with wooden planks attached to the building wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly as the player enters a dark, foggy alleyway between industrial buildings. The bright neon lights of the commercial district disappear behind, replaced by dim atmospheric lighting and heavy mist. Industrial scaffolding lines the left wall, and the silhouette of a person is visible walking ahead in the distance. The environment becomes enclosed and ominous.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-drenched commercial thoroughfare into the oppressive gloom of a foggy industrial alley. It begins under a massive transit overpass, moving along a concrete sidewalk past futuristic vehicles and floating holographic food advertisements. As the camera emerges from the cover of the overpass, the environment opens into a wide street dominated by a massive pink billboard and palm trees, eventually passing a street food cart and towering digital displays of boxing champions. The scene then shifts toward a brightly illuminated intersection where the camera follows pedestrians across a glowing green crosswalk, leaving the vibrant skyline and vendor tents behind. Finally, the atmosphere transitions abruptly as the player turns into a dark, enclosed alleyway, where the neon glow is replaced by heavy mist, industrial scaffolding, and the distant silhouette of a lone figure.
